---
title: "Predicting Park Access Rankings Across U.S. Cities"
subtitle: "DSCI 310 Group 08"
author: "Shivani Aggarwal, Luna Gulec, Jingyuan Liu, Sarenna Ulman"
execute: 
    warning: false
    echo: false
# bibliography: references.bib
format: 
    html:
        toc: true
        toc-depth: 3
        page-layout: article
        embed-resources: true
        format-links: false
        other-links:
          - text: PDF Report
            icon: file-pdf
            href: index.pdf
    pdf: 
        toc: true
        toc-depth: 3
        embed-resources: true
editor: source
---
